content: D2.1 — Parser openfootball JSON (parse_openfootball_json) en football_historical_ingestor.py con clasificación de fase
D2.2 — Helper point-in-time standings de grupo (sin leakage)
D2.3 — TOURNAMENT_CONTEXT_SCORE (escalar 0-1) + booster suave (+2pp a +3pp) en football_draw_potential.py
D2.4 — Engine backtest modo no-market: Brier + log-loss + calibration curve + hit-rate + desglose por fase (GROUP/KNOCKOUT/COMBINED)
D2.5 — Adaptar scripts/run_backtest.py con flag --openfootball-path y --no-market
D2.6 — Ejecutar backtests WC2022 y Euro2024 + generar reportes (3 archivos .md + .json + summary)
D2.7 — Tests nuevos (parser, standings PIT, context score, engine no-market) + suite global verde (3271+)
